parents.subject: LU-14975 dne: dir migration in non-recursive mode

commit.subject: LU-13756 quota: up_read leak in qmt_pool_lookup
commit.message:
LU-13756 quota: up_read leak in qmt_pool_lookup

qmt_pool_lock is not released if qti_pools_add fails in
qmt_pool_lookup.
